critic_notes: CON.8 Software-Entwicklung: 3 questions on CON.8.A2/A5/A10. Quotes match cleanly after dehyphenation. Correct answers faithful; distractors (develop-in-production, release-without-testing) clearly wrong. `experte` on 002 combines test-data isolation with data-protection rationale — appropriate. Schema clean.
